mapper.select: SELECT f.file_id , f.logical_name , f.is_deleted , f.created_at , t.task_id , t.task_title , p.project_id , p.project_title , fv.version_number , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at FROM files f LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT file_id , version_number , file_size , uploader , uploaded_at FROM file_versions WHERE (file_id, version_number) IN ( SELECT file_id, MAX(version_number) FROM file_versions GROUP BY file_id ) ) fv ON f.file_id = fv.file_id WHERE f.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT f.file_id , f.task_id , f.post_id , f.logical_name , f.is_deleted , f.created_at FROM files f JOIN file_versions fs ON f.file_id = fs.file_id WHERE f.file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT fv.version_id , fv.file_id , fv.version_number , fv.file_path , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at , fv.saved_name FROM file_versions fv WHERE fv.file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY fv.version_number
SELECT fv.version_id , fv.file_id , fv.version_number , fv.file_path , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at , fv.saved_name FROM file_versions fv WHERE fv.version_id = #{versionId}
